Imported from the official VQF repository:
https://github.com/dlaidig/vqf

Algorithm paper:
Daniel Laidig, Thomas Seel.
"VQF: Highly Accurate IMU Orientation Estimation with Bias Estimation and Magnetic Disturbance Rejection."
Information Fusion 91 (2023) 187-204.
https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.17024

Included source files in this directory are provided under the MIT license by the original author.
